title: TFC more coal
description: This mod adds anthracite, honeycomb briquette and more coal-related ores&items for TFC.
body:
给群峦传说加入了无烟煤，蜂窝煤等其他与煤相关的矿石和物品。

无烟煤：高质量的煤炭，可以在沉积岩中找到，燃烧温度高，燃烧时间长。可以在锻铁炉（仅1.21.1）和高炉里面使用。

蜂窝煤和木炭砖：燃烧温度低，但是燃烧时间更长。

如果安装了沉浸工程会有更多配方。

This mod adds anthracite, honeycomb briquette and more coal-related ores&items for TFC.

Anthracite: high quality coal, can be found in sedimentary rocks, burns at high temp and for long time. Can be used in bloomery(only 1.21.1) and blast furnace.

Honeycomb briquette and Charcoal briquette: burns at lower temp and for longer time.

There will be more recipes if Immersive Engineering is installed.
